'''√l-l-r''' ('''kalalar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:laryngectomize|laryngectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laryngectomize|laryngectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-l-r
|-
! Lemma
| kalalar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thilalar || jilalar || shilalar || kilalar
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthulalar || jujulalar || shushulalar || kukulalar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thulalar || julalar || shulalar || kulalar
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thulalar || julalar || shulalar || kulalar
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thelalar || jelalar || shelalar || kelalar
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thotholalar || jojolalar || shosholalar || kokolalar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tholalar || jolalar || sholalar || kolalar
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tholalar || jolalar || sholalar || kolalar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lalar || lalar || lalar || lalar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lalar || lalar || lalar || lalar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lalar || lalar || lalar || lalar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lalar || lalar || lalar || lalar
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thælalar || jælalar || shælalar || kælalar
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathalalar || jajalalar || shashalalar || kakalalar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thalalar || jalalar || shalalar || kalalar
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thalalar || jalalar || shalalar || kalalar
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shalalar
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshalalar
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishalalar
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shalalarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshalalarnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishalalarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shalalarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshalalarnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishalalarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shalalarro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshalalarnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishalalarro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shalalarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshalalarnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishalalarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shalalarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshalalarnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishalalarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shalalarng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshalalarnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishalalarng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shalalarya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshalalarnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishalalarya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shalalaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshalalarnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishalalaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shalalarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshalalarnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishalalarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shalalarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalalarnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalalarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shalalarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshalalarnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalalarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shalalarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshalalarnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishalalarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shalalarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalalarnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalalarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shalalarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshalalarnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalalarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shalalarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshalalarnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishalalarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shalalarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshalalarnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishalalarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shalalarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshalalarnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalalarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shalalarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshalalarnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishalalarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shalalarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshalalarnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishalalarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shalalarmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalalarnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalalarmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
